title: Template talk:Campaignbox Invasion of Yugoslavia - Wikipedia
body: This template does not require a rating on Wikipedia's content assessment scale. It is of interest to the following WikiProjects : Military history : Balkan / European / German / Italian / World War II This template is within the scope of the Military history WikiProject . If you would like to participate, please visit the project page, where you can join the project and see a list of open tasks . To use this banner, please see the full instructions .
